optionalChecks: Frontend build/test checks when frontend/tooling context is applicable
Coverage and trend artifacts in future stages
observabilityGaps: No single documented runbook for interpreting empty/missing GitHub check statuses
Workflow status-to-gate mapping was not centralized
Release-ready summary visibility in workflow UI was limited
implementedImprovements: Added CI/GitHub checks visibility audit and expected checks contract
Added CI checks visibility runbook with local fallback flow
Added governance tests for CI visibility docs/workflow safety
Updated engineering-core-v1-release-ready workflow to publish summary JSON into workflow summary/artifact
remainingLimitations: GitHub status visibility still depends on repository settings and permissions
Path/branch/tag trigger filters can legitimately yield no checks for a given commit
No claim that every commit will always show identical checks
Wrapper/tool command surface remains broad and is tracked by P8-06 scripts/tools rationalization governance.
nonClaims: No full multi-tenant isolation claim yet.
No global EF query filter claim.
